title: exallage costata
intro: Exallage costata, also known as the Exallage plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The Exallage plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of various infections. Exallage costata is believed to offer several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe and protect the body from infection. Exallage costata is traditionally prepared as a herbal infusion or decoction, often used to treat fever, coughs, and respiratory issues.
